description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a combination of suede, mesh, and synthetic materials in earthy tones of brown, olive, and gray. The shoes have a classic running silhouette with a rounded toe, padded collar, and cushioned tongue for comfort. Distinctive white side stripes, reminiscent of the Asics brand, are present on both sides of each shoe, adding a bold visual contrast. The laces are brown and follow a standard criss-cross pattern through eyelets, while the midsole is white with a gray outsole that appears to offer good traction. The heel area is reinforced with additional suede overlays, and subtle branding is embossed on the heel counter and midsole. The overall appearance suggests a durable, comfortable shoe suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A pair of low-top athletic sneakers in brown, olive, and gray with white side stripes, suede overlays, and a cushioned sole. The shoes feature a classic running design with criss-cross laces and visible branding details.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded heel collar, suede overlays, and embossed branding on the heel counter.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the white side stripes, brown suede overlays, and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe, criss-cross lacing, and the mesh and suede material mix on the toe box.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible white side stripes, suede overlays, and the layered upper design.
attribute_logo: Embossed Asics logo on the heel counter and midsole, white side stripes on both sides of each shoe.
